question_text: Currently on chemotherapy or had chemo in past 4 weeks?
Fever now or within last 24 hours?
Known low white blood cell count (neutropenia)?
Shortness of breath or low oxygen concern?
Low blood pressure or dizziness on standing?
Severe sore throat or mouth sores?
Skin redness or wound infection signs?
Central line or port in place?
Severe weakness or unable to get out of bed?
Severe pain not controlled by meds?
